articles.title: How to Tackle Coding Interviews
articles.description: How to Tackle Coding InterviewsInterview - Coding•The Polymathic Engineer  / 6mo Hi Friends, Welcome to the 130th issue of the Polymathic Engineer. Coding interviews can be intimidating. You are asked to answer a difficult problem on the spot and write code that works while also explaining your thought process to the interviewer. It's not surprising that a lot of smart engineers have trouble with
